objective: Embed the preserved ATTICUS raw import bundle into the repository in a deterministic, append-only form without mutating canonical artifacts.

ingress_strategy.reason: full raw payload was encoded locally but not previously bulk-ingested through the connector

definition_of_done: repo contains chunked representation of preserved raw bundle or equivalent deterministic payload
follow-on phases can populate raw cell indexes from repo-backed payload
notes: This plan records the first real full-load step. It does not claim the raw payload is already embedded.
